mapper.insert: INSERT INTO d_telemetry_${droneId} USING telemetry TAGS (#{droneId}, #{modelId}) VALUES (#{ts}, #{lat}, #{lon}, #{alt}, #{batteryPct}, #{rssi})
mapper.select: SELECT ts, lat, lon, alt, battery_pct, rssi FROM d_telemetry_${droneId} ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT _wstart AS win_start, AVG(battery_pct) AS avg_battery, AVG(rssi) AS avg_rssi, LAST(lat) AS lat, LAST(lon) AS lon, LAST(alt) AS alt FROM d_telemetry_${droneId} WHERE ts >= #{since} INTERVAL(${window})

SELECT drone_id, _wstart AS win_start, AVG(battery_pct) AS avg_battery, AVG(rssi) AS avg_rssi, LAST(lat) AS lat, LAST(lon) AS lon, LAST(alt) AS alt FROM telemetry WHERE ts >= #{since} PARTITION BY drone_id INTERVAL(${window})
SELECT src_drone_id, dst_drone_id, LAST(link_quality) AS link_quality, LAST(is_active) AS is_active FROM network_links WHERE ts >= #{since} PARTITION BY src_drone_id, dst_drone_id
